NY Occupational Employment & Wages — Detailed Analysis

BLS OEWS · New York State · Annual wages · 2024 · All figures at detailed occupation level (SOC)

Within-Category Wage Dispersion

Every dot is a detailed occupation (NYS statewide). Broad category labels collapse this spread into a single number. Dot size = employment. Yellow tick = category median.

NYC Wage Premium by Detailed Occupation

% difference between NYC and NYS mean wage. Dot size = NYS employment. Negative = NYC pays less than state average.

Wage Trajectory: Entry vs. Experienced

X = entry wage, Y = experienced wage. Points above the 1:1 line have earnings growth. Dot size = employment.

Regional Occupational Concentration (Location Quotient)

LQ = region share ÷ state share. LQ > 1 = disproportionate concentration. Surfaces what aggregate category charts bury.

Employment · Wage · Mobility — Zoomable Sunburst

NY State → Region → Sector → Top occupations by employment. Arc size = employment share. Color = selected metric. Click any arc to zoom in · click center to go back.

Wage by Region — Occupation-Level

Select any of 364 occupations present across all 10 NY regions. Spread % = max vs. min range — what a state average erases.
